heading: Pensions
label: 1501 Pensions
text: The United States Court of Federal Claims shall not have jurisdiction of any claim for a pension.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 250(1) (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 14536 Stat. 1136Section constitutes the exception in , U.S.C., 1940 ed.section 250(1) of title 28Changes were made in phraseology.
Amendments1992— substituted “United States Court of Federal Claims” for “United States Claims Court”.Pub. L. 102–5721982— substituted “United States Claims Court” for “Court of Claims”.Pub. L. 97–164
Effective Date of 1992 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–572section 911 of Pub. L. 102–572section 171 of this titleOct. 29, 1992
